_doc: Tess OS curated-squad config. Maps STARTER_PATH to install sets. Universal base is always installed on every path. Agents operate on the dispatchable layer (.claude/agents/*.md).

founders._description: For founders, solo operators, CEOs, strategists — bottleneck is judgment and direction.

builders._description: For developers, indie hackers, technical founders, product teams — need is shipping software.

operators._description: For agency owners, service-business operators, COOs, client-delivery leads — job is running something reliably.
